label: Insurance Type
plain: Which type of insurance is being billed (Medicare, Medicaid, Tricare, etc.).

label: Insured's ID Number
plain: The patient's ID number on the insurance card.

label: Patient's Name
plain: Last, First, MI exactly as it appears on the insurance card.

label: Patient's Birth Date / Sex
plain: Date of birth and sex marker for the patient.

label: Diagnosis or Nature of Illness
plain: Up to 12 ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, ordered by relevance.

label: Date(s) of Service
plain: From and To dates for each service line.

label: Procedures, Services, or Supplies
plain: CPT/HCPCS code with up to 4 modifiers per line.

label: Charges
plain: Provider's charge for each service line.

label: Rendering Provider ID
plain: NPI of the clinician who actually performed the service.

label: Billing Provider Info & NPI
plain: Practice name, address, and billing NPI.
